en-EN.IDS_TP_DESCRIPTION: Mass Effect meets Minecraft! This Mash-Up Pack contains a Mass Effect style Texture Pack, and a Skin Pack with 36 Mass Effect characters!

de-DE.IDS_TP_DESCRIPTION: Mass Effect trifft Minecraft! Im Mash-up-Paket: ein Mass-Effect-Texturpaket und ein Skinpaket mit 36 Figuren aus Mass Effect!

fr-FR.IDS_TP_DESCRIPTION: Mass Effect rencontre Minecraft ! Ce pack mash-up contient un pack de textures et de skin inspiré de Mass Effect avec 36 personnages !

it-IT.IDS_TP_DESCRIPTION: Mass Effect incontra Minecraft! Questo pacchetto mash-up ne contiene uno texture e uno di skin con ben 36 personaggi di Mass Effect!

es-ES.IDS_TP_DESCRIPTION: ¡Mass Effect en Minecraft! Un pack Mash-Up con uno de textura basado en Mass Effect y otro de aspecto con 36 de sus personajes.

pt-PT.IDS_TP_DESCRIPTION: Mass Effect no Minecraft! Pacote Mash-Up com um Pacote de Textura e um Pacote de Máscaras com 36 personagens de Mass Effect!

ja-JP.IDS_TP_DESCRIPTION: Mass Effect と Minecraft がコラボ! 36 種のスキンとテクスチャ パックのセット

ko-KR.IDS_TP_DESCRIPTION: Mass Effect와 Minecraft의 만남! Mass Effect 텍스처 및 캐릭터 36명이 포함되어 있습니다!

pt-BR.IDS_TP_DESCRIPTION: Mass Effect com Minecraft! Este Pacote Mash-Up contém um Pacote de texturas e um Pacote de peles com 36 personagens de Mass Effect!

zh-CHT.IDS_TP_DESCRIPTION: 當 Mass Effect 遇上 Minecraft！內含  Mass Effect 風格材質及 36 個角色外觀！
